title: rubus cymigerus
intro: Rubus cymigerus, also known as the Japanese raspberry or fragrant raspberry, is a species of raspberry native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus cymigerus are attributed to its ability to lower blood sugar levels, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Rubus cymigerus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
